## What scenario are you building?

for our Azure Landing Zone team", "Customer-support bot grounded in our docs". -->

## What have you tried?

<!-- Be specific. Which env vars did you set? Which files did you edit?
Did you read docs/customization.md? Did AGENTS.md help? -->

- Env vars changed:
- Files edited:
- Docs already read:

## Where are you stuck?

<!-- The exact symptom or decision point. -->

## Link to your fork (optional)

<!-- A link to your fork or branch helps a lot. Remove API keys before sharing. -->

## Before you submit

- [ ] I read [`docs/customization.md`](../../docs/customization.md) and the [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) project map.
- [ ] I checked [`docs/troubleshooting.md`](../../docs/troubleshooting.md) for the symptom.
- [ ] I'm not pasting any secrets (API keys, Postgres passwords, OIDC client secrets) into this issue.
